## Summary

- **Skill(s) affected:** `<name>`
- **Type:** new skill / update / fix / deprecate

<!-- 1-3 bullets: what changed and why -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` has valid frontmatter (name, description, status, user-invocable)
- [ ] Trigger words are unique (no collision with existing skills)
- [ ] `REGISTRY.md` updated (run `python scripts/gen_registry.py`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Tested manually (invoked skill, verified behavior)
- [ ] No sensitive data in SKILL.md (tokens, passwords, URLs)
